name: jason-os-PLAN
purpose: 16-domain research roadmap for building the knowledge foundation for JASON-OS — a portable Claude Code OS extracted from SoNash; defines sequencing, gating, per-domain protocol, and cross-locale persistence model.
notes: PLAN.md is mislabeled — it is actually the RESEARCH_ROADMAP spec doc (structure, per-domain protocol, dependency graph). RESEARCH_ROADMAP.md is the living status tracker. 16 domains across 3 tiers. Only Domain 02a (adoption scouting) has been initiated as of 2026-04-03. Directly relevant to JASON-OS sync project — this IS the research program that generated the current scan.
portability_notes: not-portable — SoNash-specific research program about extracting SoNash; BUT the per-domain research protocol (Phase A/B/C structure) is a reusable methodology pattern for JASON-OS.

name: jason-os-RESEARCH_ROADMAP
purpose: Living status tracker for the 16-domain JASON-OS research roadmap; updated after each domain gate.
notes: As of 2026-04-03 only Domain 02a (adoption scouting) is ongoing; all others not started. This is the primary navigation artifact for the research program.

name: jason-os-SYNTHESIS
purpose: Rolling cross-domain synthesis of JASON-OS research findings; updated at every domain gate.
notes: As of last update (2026-04-01) domains completed = 0/16; file is a template/stub with pre-research brainstorm context only. Update cadence: after each domain gate.

name: jason-os-DEPENDENCIES
purpose: Living cross-domain dependency map for JASON-OS research; defines parallelization opportunities and cross-domain finding propagation.
notes: As of 2026-04-03: Domain 02a added, no cross-domain findings yet. Defines 7 parallel groups across 3 tiers. Updated 2026-04-03 to reflect Domain 02a addition.

name: jason-os-DECISIONS
purpose: 35-decision record for the JASON-OS research roadmap: research purpose, domain definitions, structure, governance, and brainstorm revisit.
sanitize_fields: references to SoNash skills by name
notes: 35 decisions captured (Q1-Q35). Decisions #33-35 added 2026-04-03 after brainstorm revisit — added Domain 02a adoption scouting. Methodology decisions (#23-32) are highly reusable: per-domain phase protocol, gating, cross-locale persistence, no artificial limits. PORTABLE METHODOLOGY ELEMENTS: Decisions 23-32 represent a generalized multi-domain research governance model applicable to any JASON-OS research program.

name: synthesis-consolidation-PLAN
purpose: 15-step XL plan to unify repo-synthesis + website-synthesis + cross-type synthesis into a single /synthesize skill; upgrade 22 quick-scan repos to Standard depth; deprecate old skills with redirects.
notes: Status: COMPLETE. All 15 steps done. Sessions #269-#279, closed 2026-04-14. T29 in todos.jsonl. 32 decisions captured. Also known as T29. Sub-plan of CAS (T28). Surfaced by D1f as a formal skill retirement record (T29) with 32 decisions, 5 waves, 15 steps. The PLAN.md is 857 lines — the largest planning doc in this dir.

name: synthesis-consolidation-WAVE4_RESUME
purpose: Transient handoff doc for T29 Wave 4 Step 10 continuation across sessions; carries git state, branch info, wave completion status, and discipline constraints.
notes: Status: should be deleted per its own clean-up trigger (Wave 4 Step 10 complete). As of scan date the file still exists — indicates cleanup was deferred. Contains explicit self-deletion instruction: 'delete this file when Wave 4 Step 10 completes.' plan_scope is session-bookmark. 170 lines, created Session #275 (2026-04-12).

name: synthesis-consolidation-DECISIONS
purpose: 32-decision record for the synthesis-consolidation plan covering naming, architecture, scale, behavior, schema, and execution strategy.
notes: Key decisions: D1 (/synthesize command name), D4 (output path), D6 (type-aware Zod schema), D15 (artifact contracts), D30 (22 quick-scan migration). Contains SoNash-specific schema and skill architecture decisions. Not portable.

name: synthesis-consolidation-DIAGNOSIS
purpose: Diagnosis for synthesis-consolidation: roadmap alignment, research context, migration inventory, and risk assessment.
notes: 94 lines. Part of standard DIAGNOSIS/PLAN/DECISIONS artifact triple.

name: system-wide-standardization-PLAN-v3
purpose: Meta-plan for SoNash System-Wide Standardization (SWS): 6-phase transformation of 19 ecosystems; coordinates two child plans (Tooling Infrastructure, Code Quality Overhaul); defines D67 sequence, CANON foundation, L4 testing, and final verification.
notes: 2624 lines. Document Version 3.0, updated 2026-03-14. Supersedes PLAN.md (v1.1, 21-step sequential) and PLAN-v2.md (rejected draft). 92 decisions + 19 tenets + 41 directives. ~60-90 sessions estimated effort. Waves 2-3 blocked in todos.jsonl (T7 blocked on T6 blocked on T3). Status: DRAFT, Pending Approval for remaining phases. The 19 tenets (T1-T24) contain methodology gems extractable to JASON-OS (see notes in narrative).

notes: 260 lines. Generated Session #221. Serves as a decision-recall mechanism (per Q38). The pattern — phase-indexed decision recall doc required by deep-plan — is a REUSABLE METHODOLOGY PATTERN for any large multi-phase plan.

name: system-wide-standardization-CAPTURE_MANIFEST

notes: 219 lines. 3 entries: Entry 1 (Audit Ecosystem Health Plan → Step 11), Entry 2 (Ecosystem Audit Expansion → Step 11), Entry 3 (System Test Plan → Step 16). Pattern: formal tracking of 'folded' plans — archived docs whose items must surface in future deep-plans. REUSABLE PATTERN: capture manifest for plan retirement/fold is portable planning hygiene technique.
